prime_text: On a sunny farm, a mother duck sat patiently on her nest waiting for her eggs to hatch. One by one the eggs cracked open and fluffy yellow ducklings appeared. But the last egg was bigger than the rest and took much longer to hatch.

prime_text: He wandered across fields and swamps searching for a place where he belonged. He came across a flock of wild ducks but they too found him too ugly to be friend.  One evening hunters fired their guns nearby and the duckling hid in the reeds until the danger passed.
